compiled_state.title: Integrate Gate 2a into fix-bug SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Add Gate 2a (reversal check) section to plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md in the post-investigation workflow (after fix is proposed, before commit).

The section:
- Runs gate-2a-reversal-check.sh with affected file paths
- Passes --intent-aligned if Gate 1a returned intent-aligned
- Parses gate signal JSON from stdout
- If triggered:true -> adds a primary signal to the gate accumulator
- Error handling: nonzero exit, empty stdout, or JSON parse failure -> treat as triggered:false, log warning
- References gate-signal-schema.md contract

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 5 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2a.py -q
- [ ] SKILL.md contains Gate 2a section
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 2a' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] References reversal check script
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-2a-reversal-check' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Documents --intent-aligned suppression
  Verify: grep -q 'intent.aligned' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Error handling in SKILL.md must construct a FULL 5-field gate signal on error (gate_id: '2a', triggered: false, signal_type: 'primary', evidence: 'gate error: <reason>', confidence: 'low') — not just set triggered:false. This ensures validate-gate-signal.py does not reject error-path signals.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (pre-existing RED tests, 6 failing) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: SKILL.md (Gate 2a section). Tests: 7/7 pass.

comments.body: Fixed: Gate 2a integration in SKILL.md — 7/7 tests pass, all AC verified
